COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, I’m going to teach you the exact
process of the customer journey from brand
discovery (through an influencer) to purchase. This
is called the Influencer Funnel. With this information,
you’ll be able to build and optimize your own funnel
leading your customers directly to purchase.
LESSON:
INFLUENCER FUNNELS
MODULE:
ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Map out your 4-stage influencer funnel in the
workbook.
“Your instagram account acts like the initial landing page
for your influencer marketing activities.”
Tips for Profile Conversion
• 	Feed
• Content should have a similar look, feel, and
aesthetic to your influencers
• 	Bio
• Who you are/what you’re selling
• Unique Value Proposition
• Call-to-Action
• CTA Examples
• 	Link in Bio
• Waitlist landing page
• Content unlock
• Best-sellers
• Shoppable feed
